_README: Schema/field reference for a TAPPaaS satellite config (ADR-010), i.e. ~/config/satellite-<name>.json. Descriptive (not strict JSON-Schema), matching the module-fields.json / zones-fields.json style. A satellite is an EXTERNAL host (kind=external-host), NOT a Proxmox cluster:vm — so it does NOT use vmid/zone0/cluster:vm config. Secrets are never stored in this file.

values.external-host: provisioned on an external host via nixos-anywhere (the only value for satellite)

values.foundation: satellite is foundation-grade but OPTIONAL (not in the mandatory install chain)

name.description: satellite instance name (also the NixOS hostname); a site may run several

values.admin-vpn: blind UDP relay of an admin WireGuard session terminating on OPNsense

dependsOn.description: service deps; always network:vm + tappaas-cicd:vm; the backup role also needs the backup module

values.generic: operator supplies a host + SSH; no API automation

values.portal: Tier A (default): operator creates the VPS in the console
values.api: Tier B (opt-in): satellite-manager creates it via the hcloud API token

provider.serverType.note: default cx23 (x86 Intel, cheapest current line) is ample for relay/admin; cx33+ for a backup-heavy node; cax11 = ARM alternative

provider.image.note: any stock image; nixos-anywhere kexecs into the NixOS installer

host.operatorSshKeys.note: standing root SSH key(s) baked into the NixOS satellite (operator out-of-band key; NOT a tappaas-cicd key — §7.3)

tunnel.subnet.note: dedicated /31; must not collide with 10.x zones, netbird 100.64/10, or provider internal nets

tunnel.wgPort.note: satellite UDP listener; home dials out

tunnel.persistentKeepalive.note: set on the HOME side to keep the CGNAT pinhole open

reverseProxy.proxyProtocol.note: REQUIRED — preserves the real client IP for ADR-005 zone ACLs

reverseProxy.sni.note: single home cluster => '*' (plain passthrough); explicit list only for a future multi-site satellite

adminVpn.adminWgPort.note: public UDP relay port; distinct from tunnel.wgPort

adminVpn.mtu.note: admin-side WG MTU for the double-encapsulated path

adminVpn.terminatesOn.note: OPNsense terminates the admin WG; the satellite only relays

adminVpn.landingZone.note: PROVISIONAL (Q3): may reuse 'netbird' or route to 'mgmt'

adminVpn.sshPassthrough.enabled.note: optional minimal sub-mode: TCP passthrough to tappaas-cicd:22

backup.direction.note: satellite pulls home (DR property — home holds no delete cred)

backup.removeVanished.note: false => a source compromise can't erase the off-site copy

backup.encryption.note: satellite stores ciphertext only; key never leaves home (DR linchpin)

values.s3: S3 object storage (default); immutability via Object Lock; needs PBS 4.2+
values.volume: dedicated block volume + local ZFS; immutability via ZFS snapshots

backup.s3.objectLock.enabled.note: MUST be enabled at bucket creation (cannot be added later)

backup.s3.objectLock.retentionDays.note: trades immutability window vs. PBS prune/GC reclaim

backup.volume.sizeGiB.note: pre-sized to the backup set (volume backend only)

update.mode.note: satellite autoUpgrades; cluster never SSHes in to push (ADR-010 §7.3)

update.ref.note: pinned/signed; signing mechanism is implementation Q4
